title: The Messy Room
learningGoal: Read a story to understand the spatial relationships described by prepositions of place (in, on, under, next to, behind).
instructions: なくした鍵を探している人の話を読んで、質問に答えてください。鍵がどこにあるのか、前置詞（in, on, underなど）を手掛かりにして想像しながら読みましょう。(Read the story about someone looking for their lost keys and answer the questions. Use prepositions as clues to imagine where the keys are.)
readingText: Oh no, I am late for work! Where are my keys? I look on the table. They are not on the table. I look under the bed. They are not under the bed. Are they in my bag? No, the bag is empty. My cat is sleeping on the sofa. I look behind the sofa. Nothing. Then, I see my jacket. It is next to the door. I look in the pocket. Yes! My keys are in the pocket. Now I can go to work.
textInTargetLanguage: Oh no, I am late for work! Where are my keys? I look on the table. They are not on the table. I look under the bed. They are not under the bed. Are they in my bag? No, the bag is empty. My cat is sleeping on the sofa. I look behind the sofa. Nothing. Then, I see my jacket. It is next to the door. I look in the pocket. Yes! My keys are in the pocket. Now I can go to work.
baseLanguageSupportText: 大変、仕事に遅れてしまう！私の鍵はどこですか？私はテーブルの上を見ます。テーブルの上にはありません。私はベッドの下を見ます。ベッドの下にはありません。私のカバンの中でしょうか？いいえ、カバンは空っぽです。私の猫がソファの上で寝ています。私はソファの後ろを見ます。何もありません。その時、私のジャケットが見えます。それはドアの隣にあります。私はポケットの中を見ます。やった！私の鍵はポケットの中にあります。これで仕事に行けます。

exampleSentence.transliteration: アイ アム レイト フォー ワーク
exampleSentence.baseTranslation: 私は仕事に遅れています。

exampleSentence.transliteration: ホウェア アー マイ キーズ
アイ ルック アンダー ザ ベッド
exampleSentence.baseTranslation: 私はベッドの下を見ます（探します）。

exampleSentence.transliteration: ザ バッグ イズ エンプティ
マイ キャット イズ スリーピング

exampleSentence.targetText: My keys are in the pocket.
exampleSentence.transliteration: マイ キーズ アー イン ザ ポケット
exampleSentence.baseTranslation: 私の鍵はポケットの中にあります。

sentenceSupportPairs.transliteration: アイ ルック アンダー ザ ベッド
sentenceSupportPairs.baseTranslation: 私はベッドの下を探します。

sentenceSupportPairs.transliteration: アイ ルック ビハインド ザ ソファ
sentenceSupportPairs.baseTranslation: 私はソファの後ろを探します。

sentenceSupportPairs.targetText: It is next to the door.
sentenceSupportPairs.transliteration: イット イズ ネクスト トゥ ザ ドア
sentenceSupportPairs.baseTranslation: それはドアの隣にあります。

comprehensionQuestions.questionText: この人は何をしていますか？ (What is this person doing?)
options: He is looking for his cat.
He is looking for his keys.
He is sleeping on the bed.

comprehensionQuestions.questionText: 猫はどこにいますか？ (Where is the cat?)
ジャケットはどこにありますか？ (Where is the jacket?)
結局、鍵はどこで見つかりましたか？ (Where were the keys finally found?)
options: In the pocket of the jacket

comprehensionQuestions.questionText: 文章で、カバンについて何と言っていますか？ (What does the text say about the bag?)
options: The bag is on the table.
The bag is next to the door.
The keys are in the bag.

correctAnswers.q1: He is looking for his keys.
correctAnswers.q4: In the pocket of the jacket

expectedSummaryPoints: The person is late and looking for their keys.
They check on the table, under the bed, in the bag, and behind the sofa.
The cat is on the sofa.
The keys are finally found in the jacket pocket, which is next to the door.

feedbackRules.onPass: Great reading! You successfully visualized where everything was using the prepositions.
feedbackRules.onFail: Please read carefully. Pay attention to the prepositions: on (上), under (下), behind (後ろ), next to (隣), in (中).
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good effort. Review where the jacket is (next to the door) and where the cat is (on the sofa).

audioAssets.audioTranscript: Oh no, I am late for work! Where are my keys? I look on the table...

hintText: Try to draw a mental picture of the room as you read. Where is the cat? Where is the jacket?
